# 🔔 Implement Notification/Chat System

OoS includes controllers for notifications and workshop chat to keep parents and
providers informed. Our app has no messaging features.

Ideas:

- Add a simple notification table to store messages for users.
- Send notifications when a student is signed up or dropped from an activity.
- Optionally implement a chat room per activity using WebSockets or polling.

This improves engagement and communication among stakeholders.
